initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN gender.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*))) AS female_percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
WHERE alignment.alignment = 'bad';

SELECT ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN gender.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*))) AS female_percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
WHERE alignment.alignment = 'bad';
